query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `pmPlanSections` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `projectId` int NOT NULL, `sectionKey` varchar(60) NOT NULL, `content` json, `lastUpdatedBy` varchar(255), `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CONSTRAINT `pmPlanSections_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`))
